title: AN ACT CONVERTING SITIO HEBULO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATUBIG, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO SANTA FE.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 7153 / 65 OG No. 8, 1818 (February 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4997, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING SITIO HEBULO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATUBIG, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO SANTA FE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Hebulo in the Municipality of Catubig, Province of Samar, is hereby converted into a barrio to be known as Barrio Santa Fe.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
